comment: Append-only log of Monte Carlo spread and total picks per game.

columns.name: prediction_run_id
columns.comment: UUID grouping one predict notebook execution.

columns.name: predicted_at
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when picks were generated.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Schedule season for the predicted game.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Schedule week for the predicted game.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: REG, WC, DIV, CON, or SB.

columns.name: proj_home_score
columns.comment: Projected home score after market blend.

columns.name: proj_away_score
columns.comment: Projected away score after market blend.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: Lineage string for the predict run.
